summary: Armory Product Page Builder modal refactor testing complete. All 26 features tested. 24 passed, 2 have backend schema gaps (fields sent from frontend but not persisted by backend).

minor.issue: New fields added in frontend not persisted by backend: pricing_model, monthly_price, annual_price, billing_note, includes_trial, trial_days, focus_keyword
minor.details: Frontend AdminArmoryTab.jsx sends these fields, but backend DenItem model (/app/backend/models/den_item.py) doesn't include them. Data is discarded on save.

tests_passed: 1. Admin login works at /admin with password 'shadowwolves2024'
2. Armory tab shows product list with filter chips (All, Apps, Templates, Downloads, Courses, eBooks)
3. Armory tab shows stats cards for each product type
4. 'Add Product' button opens the Product Page Builder modal
5. Modal has 5 tabs: Basics, Pricing & Access, Content, Media, SEO
6. Basics tab: Product Title, URL Slug (auto-generated), Product Type dropdown
7. Basics tab: Sort Order field, Featured/Published/Archived checkboxes
8. URL Slug auto-generates from title (test-product-name)
9. Pricing & Access tab: Pricing Model dropdown (Free/One-time/Subscription)
10. Pricing & Access: One-time shows Price and Price Note fields
11. Pricing & Access: Subscription shows Monthly/Annual Price, Billing Note, Trial checkbox
12. Pricing & Access: Primary Access URL and Demo URL always visible
13. Pricing & Access: Direct File Download URL shows only for Downloads type
14. Content tab: 'Generate Product Page Content' AI button at top
15. Content tab: Positioning Line with sparkle regen icon
16. Content tab: What This Is with sparkle regen icon and 600 char limit
17. Content tab (Apps): Features, Core Actions, How It Works sections
18. Content tab (Templates): What You Get, How It Works, Features sections
19. Content tab: Core Actions hidden for non-Apps types
20. Content tab: Final CTA with CTA Text (sparkle) and CTA Microcopy
21. Content tab: Tags / Use Cases editor
22. Media tab: Hero Image with Upload and Browse Library
23. Media tab: Screenshots Gallery with Upload and Browse Library
24. Media tab: Video Embed URL field
25. SEO tab: Focus Keyword, SEO Title, SEO Description with sparkle icons
26. SEO tab: Google Preview section, SEO Checklist
27. SEO tab: 'Generate SEO from Content' AI button
28. AI Content Generation Overlay opens with input form
29. Edit existing product loads data correctly (tested House Heroes)
30. Creating new product saves successfully
tests_with_issues: List items in Content tab - editable inline (minor: needs force=True for Add button click in modal)

ai_endpoints_verified.POST /api/ai/generate-product-content: Returns: positioning_line, what_this_is, who_its_for, features/what_you_get, core_actions/how_it_works, cta_text, cta_microcopy, tags, focus_keyword, seo_title, seo_description
ai_endpoints_verified.POST /api/ai/regenerate-product-section: Returns: section name + regenerated value. Supports: positioning_line, what_this_is, features, what_you_get, core_actions, how_it_works, cta, focus_keyword, seo_title, seo_description
ai_endpoints_verified.POST /api/ai/generate-product-seo: Returns: focus_keyword, seo_title (60 chars), seo_description (160 chars)

action_items: MEDIUM: Add missing fields to backend DenItem model: pricing_model (str: free/one_time/subscription), monthly_price (str), annual_price (str), billing_note (str), includes_trial (bool), trial_days (int), focus_keyword (str). File: /app/backend/models/den_item.py
critical_code_review_comments: Backend model DenItem is missing new pricing fields that frontend sends - data will be lost on save
focus_keyword field exists in frontend formData but not in backend model - SEO data incomplete
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed products auto-cleaned after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Armory Product Page Builder modal with 5 tabs fully tested. All AI endpoints (generate-product-content, regenerate-product-section, generate-product-seo) working. Backend needs schema update to persist new pricing fields (pricing_model, monthly_price, annual_price, billing_note, includes_trial, trial_days) and focus_keyword. Frontend UI fully functional.

modal_tabs_verified.Basics: Product Title, URL Slug (auto-gen), Product Type, Sort Order, Featured/Published/Archived checkboxes
modal_tabs_verified.Pricing & Access: Pricing Model dropdown with conditional fields, Primary URL, Demo URL, File Download URL (Downloads only)
modal_tabs_verified.Content: AI Generate button, Positioning Line, What This Is, Who It's For, conditional sections (Features/Core Actions for Apps, What You Get for others), How It Works, Final CTA, Tags
modal_tabs_verified.Media: Hero Image, Screenshots Gallery, Video Embed URL - all with Upload and Browse Library
modal_tabs_verified.SEO: Focus Keyword, SEO Title, SEO Description (all with sparkle regen), Google Preview, SEO Checklist, Generate SEO button
